---
title: "Solution 4C — Microbiome PCA inside recipe (grouped CV)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidymodels))
library(dplyr)
source("_load_microbiome.R")
```

```{r data}
set.seed(7)
mic <- load_microbiome()
otu_cols <- mic_otu_cols(mic)

rec_pca <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = mic) |>
  update_role(sample_id, Individual, Sex, Day, new_role = "id") |>
  step_mutate(across(all_of(otu_cols), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
  step_pca(all_numeric_predictors(), num_comp = 20)

rec_no <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = mic) |>
  update_role(sample_id, Individual, Sex, Day, new_role = "id") |>
  step_mutate(across(all_of(otu_cols), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

xgb_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 100, tree_depth = 3, learn_rate = 0.05) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("classification")

folds <- mic_group_folds(mic, v = 5)
metrics_cls <- metric_set(roc_auc)
```

```{r compare}
set.seed(8)
rs_pca <- fit_resamples(
  workflow() |> add_recipe(rec_pca) |> add_model(xgb_spec),
  folds, metrics = metrics_cls
)
rs_no <- fit_resamples(
  workflow() |> add_recipe(rec_no) |> add_model(xgb_spec),
  folds, metrics = metrics_cls
)

bind_rows(
  collect_metrics(rs_pca) |> mutate(model = "With PCA (20 components)"),
  collect_metrics(rs_no) |> mutate(model = "No PCA (full OTU block)")
) |>
  select(model, mean, std_err)
```

PCA compresses ~200+ OTUs for speed and stability; AUC may be similar or slightly lower — the teaching point is that dimension reduction belongs **inside** CV, not on the full table before splitting.

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
